channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Physicists say quantum mechanics may not need imaginary numbers after all
item.description: Physicists from Heinrich Heine University Düsseldorf (HHU) have examined a fundamental property of quantum mechanics in collaboration with the German Aerospace Center.

item.title: Stephen Hawking's black hole laws just got a major upgrade
item.description: Scientists have developed a new framework that could finally apply the laws of thermodynamics to real, ever-changing black holes instead of only perfect, idealized ones.

item.title: A two-century-old physics experiment may aid in building future computers
item.description: Researchers at Nanyang Technological University in Singapore have found a surprisingly straightforward method to generate exotic light structures known as optical...

item.title: Brain decision-making process differs from previous assumptions, study finds
item.description: A new study indicates that the brain starts making decisions much earlier than previously believed. Researchers discovered that even primary sensory re...
